[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001010101 4
1 110111111 8
2 001110001 4
3 111101110 7
4 111110111 8
5 100011011 5
6 111110100 6
7 011101111 7

01 10 111111111 a
12 21 001111011 6
23 32 011101111 7 match 7
34 43 011101111 7 match 7
45 54 101011011 6
56 65 111110010 6
67 76 111101010 6
70 07 111001110 6

02 20 111101110 7 match 3
13 31 011110111 7
24 42 001101011 5
35 53 111110111 8 match 4
46 64 011101011 6
57 75 101011000 4
60 06 111101110 7 match 3
71 17 101111001 6

25 52 101111010 6
36 63 011100111 6
47 74 101001011 5
50 05 111011110 7
61 16 011110011 6
72 27 101101010 5

26 62 011101010 5
37 73 111101111 8
[completion]
